form_errors.invalid_datetime: Enter a valid date and time.
form_errors.not_supported: This form has no editable fields.

login.title: Login
login.confirm_email: Please confirm your email address first.

forgot_password.title: Reset Password
forgot_password.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

verify_email.subject: Email Verification
verify_email.body: Thank you for registering. Please confirm your email address by clicking the following button:
verify_email.fallback: If the button doesn't work, please copy the following link into your browser:
verify_email.footer: If you did not perform this registration, you can safely ignore this email.

password_reset_email.subject: Password Reset
password_reset_email.body: You have requested to reset your password. Please click the button below to choose a new password:
password_reset_email.fallback: If the button doesn't work, please copy the following link into your browser:
password_reset_email.footer: If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.

errors.confirm_email: Please confirm your email address first.
errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters long
errors.missing_name: Please enter your first and last name.
errors.missing_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.email_in_use: This email address is already in use.
errors.already_current_email: This is already your current email.
errors.slug_taken: This slug is already taken. Please choose another one.

messages.email_verification_sent: A verification email has been sent to your new address.
messages.password_reset_sent: A password reset email has been sent.
messages.email_confirmed: Email successfully confirmed. You can now log in.
